title: Notifications - Master Toggle OFF - Update successful
scenario: No notification pop-up appears after successful firmware update when Notifications master toggle is OFF in App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Go to App Settings > General > Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Turn OFF the Notifications master toggle.
4. Pair the Poly Bluetooth audio device with the mobile device.
5. Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
7. Put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
8. Wait for the firmware update to complete.
expected: No notification pops up upon successful firmware update completion.
